_note: Per-user, NON-SECRET config for the Targum.ai agent. Copy this file to config.json and fill in real values. Secrets (ANTHROPIC_API_KEY) stay in .env, NOT here. Once config.json exists the agent reads root_folder_id and vault_path from here; the .env keys DRIVE_SOURCE_FOLDER_ID and OBSIDIAN_VAULT_PATH are now superseded for the agent (the scripts/ bootstrap utility still reads them from .env).
